title: Mo' Enchantments
body:
Expand Minecraft’s enchanting system with 30+ vanilla-friendly enchantments designed to make combat, exploration, movement, and survival more interesting while keeping a vanilla+ feel.

**🔥 Features**
- ✨ 30+ unique enchantments
- ⚖️ Vanilla-friendly balancing
- 🛠️ Fully configurable
- 📦 Perfect for modpacks
- 🌎 Designed for survival gameplay
- 💀 Combat, mobility, utility & farming enchantments
- 🧪 Forge & NeoForge support

**📚 Full Enchantment List**

🛡️ Armor Enchantments
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
🦵 Agility (Leggings)
  
Increases movement speed.

🦘 Jumper (Leggings)

Increases jump height.

👟 Fleetfoot (Boots)

Reduces saturation loss while sprinting or jumping.

🌋 Lava Walker (Boots)

Generates basalt when walking on lava.

❤️ Adrenaline (Chestplate)

Increases defense and movement speed at low HP.

✨ Runic Ward (Chestplate)

Grants regenerating absorption hearts.

🌌 Sensing (Helmet)
Creates a source of light around the user
</details>
🪽 Elytra Enchantments
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
🪽 Floating (Elytra)
  
Reduces height loss while flying.

🚀 Soaring (Elytra)

Increases flight speed while diving.

🛡️ Padding (Elytra)

Reduces kinetic damage and grants armor.
</details>
⚔️ Weapon Enchantments
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
🏹Acceleration (Crossbow) 
  
Increases projectile speed.
  
🩸 Blood Blade (Sword)
  
Regenerates health after killing mobs.

💥 Brutality (Sword)

Increases critical damage.

❄️ Cooling Touch (Sword)

Freezes and damages enemies hit.

⚡ Execution (Axe)

Instantly kills enemies on very low HP.

🪶 Lightness (Sword)

Increases attack speed.

👃 Oath of the Nose (Sword)

Deals bonus damage to mobs with large noses.

☠️ Poison Cloud (Sword)

Poisons nearby enemies after hitting a target.

❄️ Frostbite (Bow)

Freezes arrows shot.

🌪️ Turbulence (Crossbow)

Damages and halts airborne enemies.

😵 Stunning (Shovel)

Stuns enemies hit with a cooldown.
</details>
🌊 Trident Enchantments
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
💧 Anti-Water Bane (Trident)
  
Deals bonus damage to water-vulnerable enemies.

⛓️ Chaining (Trident)

Allows tridents to chain through multiple targets.

🌊 Wave (Trident)

Pulls enemies toward the trident.
</details>
🛡️ Shield Enchantments
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
🛡️ Blocking (Shield)
  
Chance to completely block incoming hits.

🔥 Blaze Guard (Shield)

Sets attackers on fire while blocking.

🧊 Chill Guard (Shield)

Freezes and damages attackers.

💀 Rebirth (Shield)

Consumes the shield instead of letting the user die.

🏹 Reflection (Shield)

Reflects blocked projectiles back at attackers.

💨 Shove (Shield)

Pushes attackers backward.

🌵 Spikes (Shield)

Damages attackers while blocking.
</details>
⛏️ Tool & Utility Enchantments
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
🔥 Auto-Smelting (Mining Tools)
  
Automatically smelts mined blocks and killed animals.

🎣 Bait (Fishing Rod)

Chance to obtain extra loot while fishing.

📈 Boosting (Tools)

Increases XP gained from mobs and blocks.

☀️ Radiance (Durability Items)

Slowly repairs items under sunlight.

📏 Reach (Tools & Weapons)

Increases attack range and block reach.

🌾 Replanting (Hoe)

Automatically replants harvested crops.
</details>

**⚙️ Fully Configurable**

Every enchantment can be:

- ✅ Enabled or disabled
- ⚖️ Rebalanced
- 🔧 Tweaked for compatibility
- 📦 Customized for modpacks

Perfect for both lightweight vanilla+ packs and larger modded experiences.

**💬 Feedback & Suggestions**

- Found a bug?
- Have enchantment ideas?
- Want balancing tweaks?

Leave feedback and help shape the mod on my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/PstBE8qJWZ)
